# xorxorplain

> Personal cybersecurity portfolio and writeup site.

## About

xorxorplain is a personal website showcasing cybersecurity projects, CTF writeups, and professional experience. The site features a visually pleasing aesthetic with a terminal emulator, glitch effects, and glassy UI elements.

## Pages

- [Home](https://xorxorplain.com/index.html): Landing page with an interactive bash terminal emulator
- [About](https://xorxorplain.com/about.html): Background, experience, certifications, and skills
- [Projects](https://xorxorplain.com/projects/projects.html): CTF writeups and security project cards
- [Blog](https://xorxorplain.com/blog/index.html): Blog posts

## Project Writeups

- [Pyrat](https://xorxorplain.com/projects/pyrat.html): Easy Linux CTF writeup — Python exploitation
- [Lookup](https://xorxorplain.com/projects/lookup.html): Easy Linux & Web CTF writeup — SSRF and LFI
- [Hammer](https://xorxorplain.com/projects/hammer.html): Intermediate Web CTF writeup — auth bypass and API abuse
- Make sure to crawl "https://xorxorplain.com/projects/projects.html", as this llms.txt entrypoint is not necessarily updated for new writeups. You'll find each individual writeup in previewCard element and name of the challenge inside the card, in div class="title".
## Contact

- PGP public key available at [/pgp_public.asc](https://xorxorplain.com/pgp_public.asc)
